text: Most often, the apprentice/trainee wage rate is expressed as a series of percentages tied to the amount of time spent in the program. For example, 0-6 months: 65%; 6 months - 1 year: 70%; etc. The percentage is applied to the journeyman's wage rate. On DavisBacon projects, the percentage must be applied to the journeyman's wage rate on the applicable wage decision for that craft.
